text: Here I find myself at the intersection of transparency and possibility—the glass walls suggest openness, yet also separation. There is a sense of anticipation as reflected figures move purposefully through the corridor. In the next moment, the world becomes a vibrant tableau of invention. The wall boldly proclaims 'R + D,' turning this place into a sanctuary for curiosity and progress. I feel as though I am at the threshold of discovery, immersed in both the physical structure and the untamed wilds of human imagination. This space compels me to reflect on my own potential for growth and creation.
